unit_type_omissions.name: 3 BHK + 3T
unit_type_omissions.subtitle: Spacious Premium Living with Zero Space Wastage
unit_type_omissions.description: Intelligently designed 3 BHK residence that maximizes natural light, ventilation, and family bonding areas. Features a premium design with high-end sanitary fittings and expansive, wide balconies.

key_highlights.title: 3-Side Open Layout
key_highlights.description: Ensures uninterrupted wind flow, natural sunlight, and complete privacy from neighboring units.

key_highlights.title: 11-Ft High Ceilings
key_highlights.description: Offers an enhanced sense of volume, grandeur, and spacious luxury in all primary rooms.

key_highlights.title: Mivan Tech Finish
key_highlights.description: Constructed using 100% monolithic aluminum formwork for seamless, seepage-free, and earthquake-resistant walls.

whats_included.title: Video Door Phone
whats_included.description: Directly connected to the lobby security desk with a secure smart screen.

whats_included.title: Allotted Covered Parking
whats_included.description: One secure basement/stilt parking space with optional EV charging points.

whats_included.title: Separate Utility Area
whats_included.description: Dedicated washing and drying balcony adjacent to the kitchen.

views.title: Central Green Courtyard View
views.subtitle: Overlooks the 70% open biophilic gardens and recreational tracks.

views.title: Noida Extension Cityscape
views.subtitle: Panoramic uninterrupted high-rise skyline views from higher floors.

unit_type_omissions.name: 3 BHK + 3T + Study Room
unit_type_omissions.subtitle: Modern Executive Home with Dedicated Workspace
unit_type_omissions.description: The ideal home configuration for contemporary remote professionals. Integrates a private, insulated study/home-office room with a spacious 3 BHK luxury layout.

key_highlights.title: Dedicated Study Room
key_highlights.description: Insulated corner workspace designed to easily accommodate double-monitors and executive office layouts.

key_highlights.title: Dual Balconies
key_highlights.description: Double-sized deep sundeck balconies connected to both the living area and master bedroom.

key_highlights.title: Mivan Tech Finish
key_highlights.description: Constructed using 100% monolithic aluminum formwork for seamless, seepage-free, and earthquake-resistant walls.

whats_included.title: Smart Digital Lock
whats_included.description: Fingerprint, passcode, and physical key-based keyless entry on the main door.

whats_included.title: Allotted Covered Parking
whats_included.description: One secure basement/stilt parking space with optional EV charging points.

whats_included.title: AC Conduit Pipelines
whats_included.description: Pre-installed internal copper piping and drainage conduits for multi-split air conditioners.

views.title: Mini-Golf Course & Central Greens
views.subtitle: Directly overlooks the exclusive, resident-only mini-golf greens.

unit_type_omissions.name: 4 BHK + 4T + Servant Room
unit_type_omissions.subtitle: The Ultimate Luxury Wing in Noida Extension
unit_type_omissions.description: The crown jewel of Elite X. Features expansive room layouts, a dedicated servant/helper room with an attached toilet and separate entrance, and sprawling triple balconies.

key_highlights.title: Private Servant Quarter
key_highlights.description: Servant room with its own separate entry point, ensuring smooth utility without compromising family privacy.

key_highlights.title: Sprawling Triple Balconies
key_highlights.description: Deep deck-sized balconies on three sides of the apartment offer seamless indoor-outdoor living.

key_highlights.title: 11-Ft High Ceilings
key_highlights.description: Offers an enhanced sense of volume, grandeur, and spacious luxury in all primary rooms.

whats_included.title: Smart Digital Lock
whats_included.description: Fingerprint, passcode, and physical key-based keyless entry on the main door.

whats_included.title: Double Parking Slots
whats_included.description: Two dedicated, side-by-side basement/stilt parking slots with standard EV chargers.

whats_included.title: Premium Modular Kitchen
whats_included.description: Fully modular cabinetry with a stainless steel sink, quartz countertops, and dedicated chimney ducting.

views.title: Panoramic Mini-Golf & Poolside View
views.subtitle: Unimpeded panoramic vistas overlooking the mini-golf course and the multi-level deck pool.
